headline: Ahead of Synopsys (SNPS) Q2 Earnings: Get Ready With Wall Street Estimates for Key Metrics
summary: Evaluate the expected performance of Synopsys (SNPS) for the quarter ended April 2026, looking beyond the conventional Wall Street top-and-bottom-line estimates and examining some of its key metrics for better insight.

headline: Nvidia Just Opened A $1.9 Billion Position In A Critical AI Supplier
summary: Nvidia bought a $1.9 billion stake in Coherent, signaling a major bet on the optical networking infrastructure powering AI data centers.

headline: Synopsys Should Be Priced Far Higher Given The AI Megatrend
summary: Synopsys is a critical AI value chain bottleneck, yet it has underperformed despite robust fundamentals and market position. Read why SNPS stock is a strong buy.
